texto: An investigator starts research in a new field with faith, a foggy idea, and a few wild experiments. Eventually the interplay of negative and positive results guides the work. By the time the research is completed, he or she knows how it should have been started and conducted.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Donald Cram sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “An investigator starts research in a new field with faith, a foggy idea, and a few wild experimen…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a fe, work, time, útil em momentos de trabalho e time.
